batch_metadata.note: Aug 2025 hot period batch. Three-block data structure: (1) Sequential ROW-8014-8200+ (Jul 17-Aug 28, mixed Sent/Received); (2) Second parallel block ROW-9917-9964; (3) Third parallel block (Melissa messages) ROW-13922-14235. Aug 2025 is confirmed RF-07 triage hot period. S-004 (Aug 14-15 mega-cluster) and S-005 (Aug 21 read-receipt pressure) both occur this batch.

flagged_messages.message_text: [Aug 14-15 sustained mega-cluster — ~80+ messages spanning Aug 14-15 2025; COMP-RF04-024 anchor. Opening messages include inadequate-father, 'shit father,' 'dumbass,' 'asshole,' custody threats, access withdrawal, counselor relay framing.]
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Aug 14-15 sustained mega-cluster — second major flooding candidate in the dataset (parallel to Aug 4-5 2024 S-001). ~80+ messages across Aug 14-15 2025. Aug 2025 is a confirmed RF-07 triage hot period (third hot period: 2024-08, 2025-05, 2025-08). Cluster structure mirrors S-001: sustained dense episode triggered by conflict escalation into comprehensive character attack. COMP-RF04-024 (RF-04 Sev-3 mega-cluster: 'shit father' + 'dumbass' 8th + 'asshole' ADD-002 + custody threats + access withdrawal + Dr advice framing + counselor relay). RF-07 mechanism: message volume and density during Aug 14-15 constitutes flooding candidate. Without individual per-message timestamps from raw Excel data, the 5+/10-minute threshold cannot be confirmed from RF-04 batch record. However: (1) Aug 2025 is confirmed RF-07 triage hot period; (2) ~80+ messages over two days with established rapid-cluster structure consistent with prior mega-cluster pattern; (3) ADD-001 flooding threshold probable. Sev-2 assigned: hot-period anchor + probable flooding pending synthesis timestamp confirmation. ARC-RF07-001-S004.

flagged_messages.calibration_notes: Sev-2 assigned based on hot-period anchor and probable flooding consistent with ~80+ message density. Timestamp confirmation required from raw Excel data at synthesis.

flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-14188 (Received): 'I'll assume you are not picking her up since I haven't heard back from you' | ROW-14189 (Received): '[You read my message at 3:11]' | ROW-14190 (Received): 'Could've responded when you read it'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Three-message read-receipt pressure sequence. ROW-14188: unilateral scheduling assumption framed as consequence of Eli's non-response — 'I'll assume...' mechanism forces Eli to respond or lose parenting-time opportunity. ROW-14189: read-receipt cited as evidence Eli saw and ignored the message — surveil-and-document behavior. ROW-14190: 'Could've responded when you read it' — contemptuous accusation of deliberate non-response, transforming message receipt into accountability evidence. Mechanism: deploying read-receipt status as a communication pressure/surveillance tool. Per ADD-004 Sev-2 threshold: response-demand framing ('why aren't you answering?') meets the sub-pattern. Sev-1 assigned: three-message cluster; no flooding volume. Sev-2 would require confirmed parenting-time context or more aggressive response-demand language. ARC-RF07-001-S005.

unflagged_notable.assessment: Jul 19 RF-04+RF-05 compound. Full-custody threat cluster. Assessed for RF-07 flooding component: Jul 19 is between the May 2025 and Aug 2025 hot periods, in inter-hot-period territory. Flooding threshold confirmation requires timestamp granularity. Without timestamps, held as peripheral. Aug 14-15 (S-004) is the Aug hot-period anchor; Jul 19 is pre-hot-period in this batch.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE. S-004 and S-005 added. Arc now at 5 signals: S-001 (Aug 2024 Sev-2), S-002 (Dec 2024 Sev-1), S-003 (May 2025 Sev-2), S-004 (Aug 2025 mega-cluster Sev-2), S-005 (Aug 2025 read-receipt Sev-1). Sub-patterns active: flooding_candidate (S-001, S-004), response_demand (S-002, S-005), continuation_after_self_demand (S-003), read_receipt_pressure (S-005). Aug 2025 hot period confirmed active. COMP-RF07-003 generated.

compound_patterns.summary: RF-04+RF-07 compound. RF-04 (Sev-3 COMP-RF04-024: Aug 14-15 mega-cluster — 'shit father' new slur escalation, 'dumbass' 8th signal, 'asshole' ADD-002, custody threats, access withdrawal, Dr advice framing, counselor relay; ARC-RF04-001 + ARC-RF04-002) + RF-07 (Sev-2: ~80+-message dense cluster in Aug 2025 hot period; flooding candidate; ARC-RF07-001-S004). Sustained character attack and flooding pressure in a single sustained episode.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: High escalation — Aug 2025 hot period. Jul 19 full-custody threat cluster. Aug 8-9 'dingus' contempt. Aug 14-15 sustained mega-cluster (the defining event). Aug 21 read-receipt pressure. Aug 25-26 contempt continuation. This batch is among the highest-intensity periods in the dataset.
batch_observations.rf07_assessment: B-027 contains two primary RF-07 signals: S-004 (Aug 14-15 flooding candidate Sev-2) and S-005 (Aug 21 read-receipt pressure Sev-1). Aug 2025 is the third confirmed hot period. The Aug 14-15 mega-cluster parallels the Aug 4-5 2024 S-001 event in mechanism: sustained dense messaging triggered by conflict escalation. S-005 adds the read-receipt-as-surveillance mechanism to the arc.
batch_observations.custodial_context: Aug 14-15 occurs mid-week. Aug 21 read-receipt pressure may involve Eli's scheduled parenting time. ADD-004 custodial-time-overstepping elevated consideration for S-005 (Aug 21 — potential parenting-time context; not confirmed from available data).
